title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support Before Launch Date
scenario: Show limited support pop-up on home screen when current date is before device launch date
steps: 1. Set the device's current date to a date before the device's launch date.
2. Navigate to the device home screen.
3. Observe the support status displayed on the home screen.
4. Tap the info icon on the home screen.
5. Observe the pop-up message that appears.
6. Tap outside the pop-up to dismiss it.
expected: The device home screen shows limited support. Tapping the info icon displays a pop-up with the message: "Device support coming soon. In-app functionality may be limited." The pop-up can be dismissed by tapping outside it.
